title: PM Vishwakarma Yojana
meta_description: PM Vishwakarma Yojana provides skill training, toolkit worth ₹15,000, and loans up to ₹3 lakh at 5% interest for traditional artisans.

hero.one_liner: Skill training, modern toolkit, and collateral-free loans up to ₹3 lakh at 5% for 18 categories of traditional artisans

what_is_it: PM Vishwakarma Yojana launched on 17 September 2023 supports traditional artisans and craftspeople. It covers 18 trades including carpenters, blacksmiths, goldsmiths, potters, tailors, cobblers, barbers, washermen, basket makers, toy makers, and more.

Benefits include: Vishwakarma certificate and ID, 5-15 days skill training with ₹500/day stipend, modern toolkit worth ₹15,000 (free grant), collateral-free loans up to ₹3 lakh at 5% interest, and marketing support through GeM portal.

eligibility.label: Key trades
eligibility.value: Carpenter, blacksmith, goldsmith, potter, tailor, cobbler, barber, mason, toy maker, and 9 more

eligibility.label: Exclusion
eligibility.value: Should not have availed PMEGP, SVANidhi, or Mudra loans in last 5 years

how_to_apply.title: Register on pmvishwakarma.gov.in
how_to_apply.description: Verify using Aadhaar biometric, fill application with trade details.

how_to_apply.title: Gram Panchayat/ULB verification
how_to_apply.description: Local body verifies you practice the stated trade.

how_to_apply.title: Receive certificate
how_to_apply.description: Get PM Vishwakarma certificate and ID card.

how_to_apply.title: Access all benefits
how_to_apply.description: Attend training (₹500/day stipend), receive toolkit (₹15K grant), apply for loan (up to ₹3L at 5%).

important_alert.text: Only one member per family can avail benefits. The toolkit worth ₹15,000 is a grant — not a loan. You don't repay it.

faqs.question: How much loan can I get?
faqs.answer: First tranche: up to ₹1 lakh. After repaying and advanced training, second tranche: up to ₹2 lakh. Total ₹3 lakh at 5% interest.

faqs.question: Is the toolkit free?
faqs.answer: Yes. The toolkit worth up to ₹15,000 is a grant. No repayment needed.

faqs.question: Can women artisans apply?
faqs.answer: Yes. No gender restriction. Women in any of the 18 trades can register.
